name: Spargel in Weisser Sosse (White Asparagus in White Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Ham, cut into Julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the asparagus spears and reserve half a cup of the liquid.
2. Heat the margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
3. Add flour and blend it into the melted margarine.
4. Gradually pour in the asparagus liquid, milk, nutmeg, and salt while stirring constantly until the sauce thickens and bubbles.
5. Add cooked ham and seasonings to the sauce.
6. Gently incorporate the asparagus spears into the sauce and heat through without boiling. Serve in a preheated serving dish.
